name: Paris Puffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease 12 medium muffin cups.
3. In a bowl, mix together the shortening, sugar, and egg until well combined.
4. In another bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, alternating with milk, mixing alternately until just combined.
6. Fill each muffin cup 2/3 full with the batter.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Immediately roll each muffin in melted butter, then in a mixture of sugar and cinnamon.
9. Serve hot.
